name: jira
description: Jira discovery and triage workflows: publish an evidence-backed brief for one task or triage a bounded board into reviewed Bitbucket pull requests.

interface.longDescription: Investigates one Jira task and publishes an implementation brief, or triages a bounded board into reviewed Bitbucket pull requests.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $jira:discovery to investigate this Jira task and publish its implementation brief.
